channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Aftermath of party, 29th March
item.description:
Litter Horrible aftermath of boozy gathering. Ice is only partially melted so it’s recent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins always left on pavement., 29th March
item.description:
Bins are always left on the pavement. Never taking in. Can make it tricky navigated withour kids.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ickburgh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins are always on the pavement., 29th March
item.description:
Bins are always on the pavement. General public starts using them as a bin. Bin men haven't emptied recently, probably as overflowing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ickburgh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin outside Sainsbury's overflowing and rubbish blown all over the pavement., 29th March
item.description:
The pavement between Churchfields Road and Sidney Road is forever littered with detritus. This is a constant problem. It is unsightly and unpleasant to walk on every day. The litter problem gives this busy residential area a filthy feel. Please could a permanent solution be found. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lift workers leftovers, 29th March
item.description:
5th floor. Leftover from workers fixing lift. Been 6 weeks now. Lift is working so think they are done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wardrobes, 29th March
item.description:
Weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A sofa has been dumped on Cole Street, 29th March
item.description:
A sofa has been dumped on Cole Street - initially it was just the dumping. Now it is being used by students in the area to sit and drink on. So not only is it rubbish it but now it's allowing for anti-social/drinking behaviour. It is too big to take to the dump by ourselves or we would.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Cole Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on 1st floor and down to ground floor, 29th March
item.description:
Builders have left broken glass and not bothered to tidy up after themselves

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv and pram, 29th March
item.description:
TV on the grass between Kingsholm and Brenley Gdns. Pram on the grass opposite 32 Kingsholm Gdns

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsholm Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large boxes and sofas on Graham Rd, 29th March
item.description:
Very large cardboard boxes and old sofas dumped on Graham Road, A1207, on the corner with Royal Oak Rd. Blocking much of the pavement. Thanks for fixing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Granville Road - lane next to Granville Rec allotments., 29th March
item.description:
Following months of a homeless encampment using the lane connecting both ends of Granville Road there is now sadly an enormous amount of rubbish and abandoned furniture, appliances etc littering this lane. Please can this be dealt with to avoid further encampments appearing?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: End of Granville Road (west side), 29th March
item.description:
It appears that someone is living permanently in a caravan at the end of Granville Road outside the Granville/Carlton centres (which is not allowed/classed as a public nuisance). They have strewn rubbish, furniture and other items around the caravan on the street which is a mess and illegal. Please can you address this situation?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Road is destroyed, 29th March
item.description:
Some potholes are marked for repair, most have not, huge stones all over the road, flying up when cars go over them, risk of injury or damage, please fix urgently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunvegan Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 29th March
item.description:
Follow pathway from new road into the woods, along the back of houses route dead animal on left hand side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Woolwich Road, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped metal rubbish, 29th March
item.description:
Some metal rubbish and a chair has been left by the wall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Braddyll Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish on Horton Road, 29th March
item.description:
There is a lot of rubbish on the pavements and in the road on Horton Road at the moment. Does our street still get regularly cleaned? There seems to be lots of litter quite often these days. Thanks for looking into this
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old road sign left on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Road sign is leaning against the garden wall outside no. 8 Horton Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Horton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By white wall garage, 29th March
item.description:
Bags of clothes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Multiple huge potholes on Deepdene Road, 29th March
item.description:
There are multiple deep potholes throughout Deepdene Road. While streets nearby seem to be getting all the love, it appears that this unexpectedly busy and much used road with illegal, rampant and inconsiderate parking round th clock is not being paid attention to at all. Residents and users of the road are suffering from broken cars and bad backs due to these huge potholes. Please fix ASAP just like all the surrounding roads are being resurfsaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 29th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derby Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
